title: Extramarks Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Extramarks Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Extramarks Holdings Services in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Extramarks Holdings Services:
Extramarks Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Extramarks Holdings Services!
